title: 10 Herbal Creams For Adrenal Fatigue
intro_desc: Herbal creams for adrenal fatigue are becoming increasingly popular as a natural way to combat this condition. Adrenal fatigue occurs when the adrenal glands, which produce hormones that help our body respond to stress, become exhausted. This can lead to fatigue, brain fog, and other symptoms that affect daily life.  Herbal teas can help relieve adrenal fatigue by providing the body with the nutrients it needs to recover. For example, Withania somnifera, also known as ashwagandha, is an herb that has been shown to help reduce stress and anxiety, while also improving sleep quality. Schisandra chinensis, a Chinese herb, has been used for centuries to boost energy and vitality, and is believed to help support adrenal function.  Panax ginseng, another example of an herb that can help with adrenal fatigue, is often referred to as an adaptogen. This means that it helps the body adapt to stress and promote balance. When taken as a tea, these herbs can be absorbed into the bloodstream and provide the body with the nutrients it needs to recover from adrenal fatigue. This can lead to a range of benefits, including improved energy levels, better sleep quality, and a reduced sense of fatigue.

remedies.remedy_desc: Withania somnifera creams contains bioactive constituents such as withanolides, alkaloids, and glycosides. These compounds have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that can help reduce cortisol levels and alleviate symptoms of adrenal fatigue. The withanolides in Withania somnifera creams have been shown to inhibit the enzyme 11-beta-hydroxysteroid dehydrogenase, which converts cortisol into its more potent form. By inhibiting this enzyme, Withania somnifera creams may help reduce cortisol levels and promote a sense of calm and well-being. The antioxidants in Withania somnifera creams can also help protect the adrenal glands from oxidative stress, which can contribute to adrenal fatigue.
remedies.image_alt: Withania somnifera herbal creams for adrenal fatigue
remedy_procedure: Gather ingredients: 1 cup of Withania somnifera root powder, 1/2 cup of coconut oil, 1/4 cup of beeswax, 2 tablespoons of vitamin E oil, and 2 tablespoons of essential oil (optional).
Melt coconut oil and beeswax in a double boiler or a microwave-safe bowl in 30-second increments, stirring between each interval, until smooth.
Add Withania somnifera root powder and stir well. Let it sit for 10-15 minutes to allow the powder to infuse into the oil.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or a fine-mesh sieve into a clean bowl. Discard the solids. Add vitamin E oil and essential oil (if using) and stir well.
Pour the mixture into a tin or a jar and let it cool and solidify. Once set, your Withania somnifera cream is ready to use.

remedies.remedy_desc: Schisandra chinensis creams contains schisandrins, schisandrin B, and schisantherin A, which have been found to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. These compounds help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the body, which can contribute to adrenal fatigue. Schisandra chinensis also contains schisandrins, which have been shown to have adaptogenic properties, helping the body adapt to stress and promoting balance in the adrenal system. The antioxidants in Schisandra chinensis creams can also help reduce cortisol levels and promote the production of other essential hormones. By reducing oxidative stress and promoting balance in the body, Schisandra chinensis creams may help alleviate symptoms of adrenal fatigue.
remedies.image_alt: Schisandra chinensis herbal creams for adrenal fatigue
remedy_procedure: Gather ingredients: 1 cup of dried Schisandra chinensis berries, 2 tablespoons of coconut oil, 2 tablespoons of beeswax, 2 tablespoons of shea butter, 1 teaspoon of vitamin E oil, 1 teaspoon of essential oil (optional).
Melt the coconut oil and beeswax in a double boiler or a heat-proof bowl set over a pot of simmering water. Stir until the beeswax is fully melted.
Add the shea butter to the melted mixture and stir until it's fully incorporated.
Add the dried Schisandra chinensis berries to the mixture and steep for 10-15 minutes, allowing the berries to infuse their properties into the cream.

Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or a fine-mesh sieve into a clean bowl, discarding the solids. Add the vitamin E oil and essential oil (if using) and stir to combine. Pour the mixture into a glass jar and let it cool before use.

remedies.remedy_desc: Panax ginseng creams contains bioactive constituents like ginsenosides, particularly ginsenoside Rg1, ginsenoside Rb1, and ginsenoside Re. These compounds have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce oxidative stress, a common issue in adrenal fatigue. Ginsenosides also stimulate the production of ATP, the energy currency of cells, which is essential for adrenal function. Additionally, Panax ginseng creams contain eleutherosides, which have been shown to increase the production of cortisol and adrenaline, helping to alleviate symptoms of adrenal fatigue. By addressing oxidative stress and stimulating energy production, Panax ginseng creams may provide relief for individuals experiencing adrenal fatigue.
remedies.image_alt: Panax ginseng herbal creams for adrenal fatigue
remedy_procedure: Gather ingredients: 1 cup of coconut oil, 1/2 cup of beeswax, 2 tablespoons of Panax ginseng root extract, 2 tablespoons of vitamin E oil, 2 tablespoons of aloe vera gel.
Melt coconut oil and beeswax in a double boiler or a heat-proof bowl set over a pot of simmering water.
Remove melted mixture from heat and let cool slightly. Add Panax ginseng root extract, vitamin E oil, and aloe vera gel. Stir well.
Pour mixture into a small tin or container. Let it cool and harden at room temperature.
Once hardened, your Panax ginseng cream is ready to use. Apply a small amount to affected areas as needed.

remedies.remedy_desc: Astragalus membranaceus creams contains a rich mix of bioactive constituents, including flavonoids, saponins, and polysaccharides. These compounds have anti-inflammatory and adaptogenic properties that can help alleviate symptoms of adrenal fatigue, such as fatigue, anxiety, and insomnia. The saponins in Astragalus membranaceus creams have been shown to stimulate the hypothalamic-pituitary-adrenal (HPA) axis, which regulates the body's stress response and cortisol production. The flavonoids in the cream may also help protect against oxidative stress and inflammation in the adrenal glands. By reducing inflammation and promoting balance in the body's stress response, Astragalus membranaceus creams may help alleviate the symptoms of adrenal fatigue.
remedies.image_alt: Astragalus membranaceus herbal creams for adrenal fatigue
remedy_procedure: Gather ingredients: 1 cup of Astragalus membranaceus root powder, 1/2 cup of coconut oil, 1/4 cup of beeswax, 2 tablespoons of shea butter, and 2 tablespoons of vitamin E oil.
Melt coconut oil and beeswax in a double boiler or a heat-proof bowl set over a pot of simmering water.
Add Astragalus membranaceus root powder to the melted mixture and stir well.
Remove the mixture from heat and stir in shea butter and vitamin E oil until well combined.
Pour the mixture into small containers and let it cool and solidify before use.

remedies.remedy_desc: Rhodiola rosea creams contains active constituents like rosavin, rosin, and salidroside, which are known to help alleviate adrenal fatigue. Rosavin is an adaptogenic compound that helps regulate the body's stress response by increasing the production of certain neurotransmitters and hormones. Rosin, a type of flavonoid, has antioxidant properties that protect cells from damage caused by oxidative stress, a common contributor to adrenal fatigue. Salidroside, a glycoside, has been shown to improve mental performance and reduce fatigue by enhancing the activity of certain enzymes in the brain. By regulating the body's response to stress and protecting cells from damage, Rhodiola rosea creams can help alleviate the symptoms of adrenal fatigue.
remedies.image_alt: Rhodiola rosea herbal creams for adrenal fatigue
remedy_procedure: Gather ingredients: 1 cup of distilled water, 1/4 cup of beeswax, 2 tablespoons of coconut oil, 2 tablespoons of shea butter, 2 teaspoons of Rhodiola rosea extract, and 10 drops of vitamin E oil.
Melt the beeswax, coconut oil, and shea butter in a double boiler or a heat-proof bowl set over a pot of simmering water.
Add the distilled water and Rhodiola rosea extract to the melted mixture. Stir well to combine.
Remove the mixture from the heat and let it cool slightly. Add the vitamin E oil and stir well.
Pour the mixture into small containers and let it cool and harden completely. Store in a cool, dark place.

remedies.remedy_desc: Zingiber officinale creams contains active compounds like gingerol and shogaol, which are responsible for its therapeutic properties. These compounds help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, common issues associated with adrenal fatigue. Ginger has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, thanks to its high concentration of polyphenols and flavonoids. The anti-inflammatory compounds in ginger, such as gingerols and shogaols, have been shown to inhibit the production of pro-inflammatory cytokines, which contribute to adrenal fatigue. By reducing inflammation and oxidative stress, Zingiber officinale creams may help alleviate symptoms of adrenal fatigue, such as fatigue, insomnia, and weight gain.
remedies.image_alt: Zingiber officinale herbal creams for adrenal fatigue
remedy_procedure: Gather ingredients: 2 tablespoons of grated fresh Ginger root (Zingiber officinale), 1 cup of coconut oil, 1/2 cup of beeswax, 2 tablespoons of vitamin E oil, and 2 tablespoons of shea butter.
Melt the coconut oil and beeswax in a double boiler or a heat-proof bowl set over a pot of simmering water.
Once melted, add the grated Ginger root and stir well. Let it steep for 10-15 minutes to infuse the oil with Ginger's healing properties.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or a fine-mesh sieve into a clean bowl, discarding the Ginger solids. Add the vitamin E oil and shea butter, and mix well.
Pour the mixture into a clean, sterilized container and let it cool and solidify. Store the Zingiber officinale cream in a cool, dark place for up to 2 weeks.

remedies.remedy_desc: Ginkgo biloba creams contains flavonoids and terpenoids, which are active constituents that help alleviate symptoms of adrenal fatigue. Flavonoids, such as quercetin and kaempferol, have anti-inflammatory properties that reduce oxidative stress and promote healthy cortisol production. Terpenoids, including bilobalide and ginkgolides, improve blood flow and oxygen delivery to the adrenal glands, enhancing their function and reducing fatigue. The anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties of Ginkgo biloba also help protect the adrenal glands from damage caused by chronic stress, supporting their long-term health. By addressing the underlying causes of adrenal fatigue, Ginkgo biloba creams can help alleviate symptoms like fatigue, brain fog, and insomnia.
remedies.image_alt: Ginkgo biloba herbal creams for adrenal fatigue
remedy_procedure: Gather ingredients: 1 cup of coconut oil, 1/2 cup of beeswax, 2 tablespoons of Ginkgo biloba extract, 2 tablespoons of jojoba oil, 2 tablespoons of vitamin E oil.
Melt coconut oil and beeswax in a double boiler or a heat-proof bowl set over a pot of simmering water.
Remove melted mixture from heat and stir in Ginkgo biloba extract, jojoba oil, and vitamin E oil until well combined.
Pour mixture into a silicone candy mold or a small tin container to shape into desired cream form.
Let mixture cool and solidify completely before using as a Ginkgo biloba cream for adrenal fatigue.

remedies.remedy_desc: Valeriana officinalis creams contains valerenic acid, isovaleric acid, and valepotriates as its active constituents. These compounds have a sedative and relaxing effect on the body, helping to calm the nervous system and reduce stress. The valepotriates in Valeriana officinalis creams have been shown to have a positive effect on the adrenal glands, helping to regulate their function and alleviate symptoms of adrenal fatigue, such as fatigue, insomnia, and anxiety. The anti-inflammatory properties of the valepotriates also help to reduce inflammation and promote relaxation, further contributing to the relief of adrenal fatigue symptoms. By reducing stress and promoting relaxation, Valeriana officinalis creams can help to support the adrenal glands and promote overall well-being.
remedies.image_alt: Valeriana officinalis herbal creams for adrenal fatigue
remedy_procedure: Gather ingredients: 1 cup of dried Valeriana officinalis root, 1 cup of coconut oil, 1/2 cup of beeswax, 2 tablespoons of vitamin E oil, and 2 tablespoons of lavender oil.
Melt coconut oil and beeswax in a double boiler or a heat-proof bowl set over a pot of simmering water.
Add dried Valeriana officinalis root to the melted oil and beeswax mixture. Let it steep for 2-3 hours or overnight to infuse the root's properties.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or a fine-mesh sieve into a clean bowl. Discard the solids and add vitamin E oil and lavender oil.
Pour the mixture into small glass jars and let it cool and solidify. Label and store the cream in a cool, dry place.

remedies.remedy_desc: Bacopa monnieri creams contains a rich source of bacosides, a group of active constituents that have been shown to support adrenal function. Bacosides A and B, in particular, have been found to have a positive impact on the body's stress response, helping to regulate cortisol levels and promote balance in the adrenal glands. The antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties of bacosides may also help to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the adrenal glands, which can contribute to fatigue. Additionally, the adaptogenic properties of Bacopa monnieri have been shown to help the body adapt to physical and mental stress, promoting resilience and energy. By supporting the health of the adrenal glands and promoting balance in the body's stress response, Bacopa monnieri creams may help alleviate symptoms of adrenal fatigue.
remedies.image_alt: Bacopa monnieri herbal creams for adrenal fatigue
remedy_procedure: Gather ingredients: 1 cup of coconut oil, 1/4 cup of beeswax, 2 tablespoons of Bacopa monnieri extract, and 2 tablespoons of vitamin E oil.
Melt coconut oil and beeswax in a double boiler or a heat-proof bowl set over a pot of simmering water.
Add Bacopa monnieri extract and vitamin E oil to the melted mixture. Stir well to combine.
Remove the mixture from heat and let it cool until it reaches 120°F to 130°F. This is the ideal temperature for pouring into molds.
Pour the mixture into ice cube trays or small containers and let it cool and solidify. Once set, transfer the creams to an airtight container and store in a cool, dark place.

remedies.remedy_desc: Eleutherococcus senticosus creams contains bioactive constituents like eleutheroside E, eleutheroside B, and isofraxidin. These compounds help regulate the body's stress response by stabilizing the adrenal glands and promoting their function. The adaptogenic properties of Eleutherococcus senticosus help the body adapt to stress, reducing the demand on the adrenal glands and promoting a state of balance. The anti-inflammatory properties of isofraxidin also help reduce inflammation in the adrenal glands, which can be a contributing factor to adrenal fatigue. By regulating the body's stress response and reducing inflammation, Eleutherococcus senticosus creams can help alleviate symptoms of adrenal fatigue.
remedies.image_alt: Eleutherococcus senticosus herbal creams for adrenal fatigue
remedy_procedure: Gather ingredients: 1 cup of dried Eleutherococcus senticosus roots, 1 cup of coconut oil, 1/2 cup of beeswax, 2 tablespoons of vitamin E oil, and 2 tablespoons of lavender essential oil.
Grind the dried Eleutherococcus senticosus roots into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Melt the coconut oil and beeswax in a double boiler or a heat-proof bowl set over a pot of simmering water.
Add the ground Eleutherococcus senticosus powder, vitamin E oil, and lavender essential oil to the melted oil mixture. Stir well to combine.
Pour the mixture into small glass jars or tin containers. Let it cool and solidify before use. Store in a cool, dry place.

faq_prevent: Drinking herbal tea can help support adrenal function, which may help prevent adrenal fatigue from forming. Herbal teas like ashwagandha, ginseng, and licorice root contain adaptogenic properties that can help regulate stress hormones. These teas can promote relaxation and balance the body's response to stress, potentially reducing the risk of adrenal fatigue.
faq_safe: Consuming herbal teas daily for adrenal fatigue can be safe if done in moderation. Some herbal teas like ashwagandha, rhodiola, and ginseng may help reduce stress and fatigue. However, overconsumption can cause interactions with other medications or worsen conditions like high blood pressure. Moderation is key when using herbal teas as a supplement.
faq_timeline: Herbal teas can help with adrenal fatigue, but it's hard to say exactly how long they'll take to work. Some people notice a difference within a few weeks, while others may need to drink them for a few months to feel the effects. It's different for everyone, and it depends on the teas and the person's body.
faq_time: For adrenal fatigue, it's best to drink herbal tea in the morning or early afternoon when your energy is usually lower. This helps boost your energy levels and calm your nervous system. Drinking tea too close to bedtime can interfere with your sleep, so it's better to have it a few hours before bed.
faq_interaction: Herbal teas can interact with prescription medications for adrenal fatigue. Some herbs, like St. John's Wort, can affect how your body processes certain medications. This might lead to increased or decreased effects of your prescribed medication. It's also possible that herbal teas could worsen your adrenal fatigue symptoms if not used carefully.
faq_pregnant: If you're pregnant and trying to manage adrenal fatigue with herbal teas, be cautious. Some herbs, like ginseng and licorice root, can cause blood pressure to rise, which isn't good for you or your baby. Also, some teas, like those with high caffeine levels, can affect your baby's growth.
faq_breastfeeding: Herbal teas for adrenal fatigue can be a helpful addition to your routine, but be cautious while breastfeeding. Some herbs, like licorice root and ginseng, can pass into breast milk and affect your baby. Choose teas specifically labeled as safe for breastfeeding, like peppermint or chamomile, and always check the ingredients.
title_2: Overcoming Adrenal Fatigue with 10 Herbal Creams: A Guide for Shift Workers
